name: mufal
description: Give Codex dated project context from Mufal meetings, transcripts, decisions, and actions.

interface.shortDescription: Bring Mufal meeting and project context into Codex
interface.longDescription: Connect Mufal to give Codex a dated, traceable view of every project: goals, durable memory, linked meetings, decisions, action items, speakers, transcripts, and saved meeting chats.
defaultPrompt: Summarize my latest Mufal meetings and list the open actions.
Give me the current status of my Mufal project with dated evidence and open actions.
Build a chronological timeline of decisions across this project's meetings.
Search my Mufal project for requirements that affect this codebase.
